name: US Dollar Payment Token
launchPhaseDetail: Crossmint wallet partnership live; CEO presented at Digital Asset Summit NYC (Mar 2026); U.S. Bank confirmed as reserve custodian via Anchorage Digital; Rain/Visa prepaid card partnership for inflation zones; CoinGecko preview listing (zero supply); token not yet deployed on Solana

featuredContent.title: USDPT and the Digital Asset Network, built on Solana
Western Union to Launch Stablecoin on Solana With Anchorage Digital
featuredContent.description: Western Union plans to launch USDPT for its 100-million-user payment network, becoming the latest traditional finance firm tapping blockchain rails for global transfers.

featuredContent.title: Western Union has big plans for stablecoins
featuredContent.description: CEO Devin McGranahan outlines strategy: converting negative float to positive float revenue, opening network to community banks, and enabling dollar-denominated holdings in inflationary regions.

milestones.title: Western Union announces USDPT on Solana with Anchorage Digital
milestones.description: USDPT to be issued by Anchorage Digital Bank, connecting on-chain dollar transfers to Western Union's cash network spanning 200+ countries.

milestones.title: Anchorage Digital Bank named as federally regulated issuer
Crossmint partnership for wallet infrastructure and payment APIs
milestones.description: Crossmint integrates USDPT into wallet infrastructure, enabling fintech developers to build on Solana with cash-out through Western Union locations.

milestones.title: CEO speaks at Digital Asset Summit NYC; U.S. Bank confirmed as reserve custodian
milestones.description: McGranahan outlines float-revenue model, community bank onboarding vision, and dollar-denominated holdings for inflationary regions; confirms U.S. Bank as custodian via Anchorage Digital.
